Experience

Senior Software Development Engineer specializing in blockchain and AI-driven systems, with scalable services, Web3, and AWS.

Freelance

Senior Software Development Engineer

Apr 2025 – Present · Remote

  • Worked as an independent software engineer on client projects.
  • Designed and implemented backend services and system components.
  • Web3-related development, including smart contract and protocol-side work.
  • Built and integrated fullstack applications across backend and frontend.
  • Integrated automated and AI-driven workflows into production systems.
  • Worked in cloud-based environments and handled deployment and operations.

Grease Co., Ltd.

Senior Software Development Engineer (Contractor)

Jan 2024 – Mar 2025 · Kanagawa · Remote

  • Created backend applications and internal tools for operational support systems tied to the export inspection process and logistics workflows.
  • Developed performance-critical parts of the application, including data processing modules in C++ and utilities to communicate with external devices and the inspection pipeline.
  • Built and managed the environment on AWS with a focus on reliability, monitoring, and cost control.
  • Coordinated with multiple teams to modernize legacy components and improve overall application stability.
  • Participated in code reviews, technical design discussions for new features, and incremental refactoring of older functionality.

Front-end Developer

Mar 2019 – Jul 2022 · Nagoya · Remote

  • Developed a map for a real estate company’s website so 3,600+ users could search for properties by municipality.
  • Conducted routine updates, security patches, and ongoing website maintenance.

Daishi Kaito

Web3, AI/automation in production, AWS, and fullstack delivery—from Nagoya, working remote with clients worldwide.
